goal: Redesign structured signal writes so seal records decisions by default and constraints risks followups require explicit command or human promotion

summary.title: 重做结构化信号写入入口
summary.what: 把默认 seal contract 收敛为决策记录，移除 seal prepare 对 risks、followups、anti_patterns 的暗示，并在 submit 阶段拒绝这些 seal-created action signals。同时新增显式 signal 事件和命令入口：risk add 校验结构化 failure mode，followup add 校验 provenance，guard add 只能通过交互式人类确认创建 constraint；status actionable 和 Hub 主导航也不再把 risks/followups 当日常队列推动。
summary.why: 目标文档要求解决入口污染，而不是在旧字段上继续修补。agent 默认只能记录 history/decisions，不能把临时判断写成长期共享事实；真正需要长期存在的 constraint、risk、followup 必须走显式入口或人类确认。
summary.user_goal: Redesign structured signal writes so seal records decisions by default and constraints risks followups require explicit command or human promotion

decisions.point: 默认 seal 是否仍携带 action signal 字段
decisions.chose: 默认 seal starter 和 instruction 不再包含 risks、followups、anti_patterns，并且 submit 对这些字段非空直接拒绝。
decisions.rationale: 只靠 prompt 告诉 agent 少写仍会让 schema 暗示这些字段应该填；从 contract 和 submit gate 两边移除才是真正堵住污染入口。
rejected: 保留字段但增加更严格的结构化校验

decisions.point: 长期 signal 的创建路径
decisions.chose: 新增独立 signal events 和显式命令：guard/risk/followup add，而不是继续把 signal 存进 seal summary。
decisions.rationale: 这样 intent seal 仍是不可变历史记录，action signal 则有自己的来源、ID、生命周期和权限语义。

decisions.chose: guard add 在 CLI 层要求交互式确认，非 TTY 直接拒绝；engine 事件路径保留给这个确认后的入口。
decisions.rationale: constraint 是人授予系统的未来行为规则，不应由 agent 在非交互 seal 或普通命令流里顺手创建。

decisions.point: 旧实现和旧数据如何处理
decisions.chose: 保留 legacy summary risks/followups/anti_patterns 的读取和生命周期兼容，但新写入走显式事件；status actionable 和 Hub 主导航降级这些队列。
decisions.rationale: 不能破坏已有 ledger 的可读性，但也不能继续把旧字段作为新 agent 的默认写入面。

rejected.alternative: 继续在 seal summary 内用结构化 RiskStatement/FollowupStatement 约束 agent
rejected.reason: 这仍然保留了 agent 在 seal 里主动脑补长期 signal 的入口，只是把噪音从自由文本换成结构化噪音。

review_notes: preflight 报告与 int_4ca4d1db / int_d19e147b 大面积 overlap；这是本次按用户要求重做旧实现的预期冲突，而不是意外并行修改。
dogfood 验证：seal prepare starter 的 summary 只含 title/what/why/user_goal/decisions/rejected；风险缺 trigger/impact 会被 risk add 拒绝；guard add 在非交互环境被拒绝；seal submit 带 summary.risks 会被拒绝。
没有运行 make test；按仓库偏好只跑了聚焦测试、编译检查和 git diff --check。

architectural_claims: Default seal is a history/decision record, not an action-signal creation path.
Durable constraints, risks, and follow-ups are explicit signal events with dedicated command entrypoints.
Legacy seal-embedded signals remain readable but are no longer default-write surfaces.
behavioral_changes: seal --prepare no longer pre-populates or prompts risks/followups/anti_patterns.
seal --submit rejects non-empty summary.risks, summary.followups, or summary.anti_patterns before mutation.
mainline guard add requires interactive confirmation; non-interactive calls fail recoverably.
mainline risk add and followup add validate required structure/provenance before appending signal events.
status --actionable no longer promotes open risks/followups as daily inbox items.
Hub sidebar no longer links risk review as a primary navigation item.
security_implications: Reduces agent authority to create future hard constraints without human confirmation.
migration_notes: Existing summary risks/followups/anti_patterns remain readable as legacy data; new writes should use explicit signal commands.
